review_text: I can’t say enough about my experience! I had previously gone to a Dermatologist up the street for PDL to correct my facial redness and broken capillaries- 6 sessions later ( shame on me- I should have trusted my gut after 3 sessions and stopped- but trusted this Derm) and a lot of money wasted- there was zero improvement. Only 1 session with Dr Kovak using IPL and another laser pretty much got rid of all my broken capillaries!  I even had brown spots come up to the surface that completely went away, and my face looks so much tighter and firm. I am thrilled with the results and will not go anywhere else. Dr Kovak took so much time to talk with me- even saw me as a walk in. I highly recommend!
review_date_label: Oct 06, 2022 (verified from SerpAPI iso_date, last edited Mar 06, 2026)

review_text: I went  to see Dr Kovak today for the first time to have a large vein starting from my temple ending underneath my eye.  Had it for years but was too afraid to have it removed.   Dr. Kovak did an amazing job removing it with a laser and was thrilled literally to tears.  He exceeded my expectations.  Also His assistant, and I’m sorry I don’t know her name was very kind and caring.  I can’t wait to get my other eye done and looking forward to having other procedures done by Dr. Kovak. I would highly recommend Dr Kovak.  Thank you again😊…….Kim Pecoraro Banks
